title: Squirrel Removal in Gowanus, Brooklyn | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Gowanus, Brooklyn. Humane extraction, entry point sealing, and damage repair. Licensed experts. Call for fast service!
intro: Gowanus residents know that squirrels can quickly become a serious problem when they invade attics, crawl spaces, and roof lines of the neighborhood's historic brownstones and converted industrial buildings. Our expert squirrel removal team provides fast, humane solutions to protect your Gowanus property from damage caused by nesting, chewing, and contamination. We serve all of Gowanus, from the Gowanus Canal area to the tree-lined streets near Carroll Gardens.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has over 15 years of experience serving Brooklyn communities like Gowanus with specialized wildlife removal services. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges of squirrel infestations in both residential brownstones and converted loft spaces, using humane methods and providing comprehensive exclusion work to prevent future invasions.
localContext: Gowanus's mix of historic brownstones, industrial conversions, and mature street trees creates ideal conditions for squirrel populations to thrive and seek shelter in attics and building structures. The neighborhood's ongoing revitalization and proximity to the Gowanus Canal area means properties of all types require expert wildlife management to protect valuable investments.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Gowanus?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Gowanus typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage repair needed. This includes humane trapping, exclusion work, and sealing entry points to prevent re-entry.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have squirrels in my Gowanus home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in your attic or walls, especially during early morning and evening hours, visible damage to roof soffits or vents, chewed wires or insulation, droppings in the attic, and seeing squirrels repeatedly entering or exiting the same spot on your roofline.

faqs.question: Are squirrel removal methods humane in Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use only humane, legal squirrel removal methods in accordance with New York State wildlife regulations. Our approach includes live trapping and relocation when appropriate, one-way exclusion doors that allow squirrels to leave but not return, and comprehensive sealing of entry points to ensure they find suitable habitat elsewhere.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a squirrel problem in Gowanus?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for most squirrel removal calls in Gowanus. Squirrels can cause significant damage quickly by chewing through electrical wiring and insulation, so we prioritize rapid response to protect your property and prevent costly repairs.
